This is not the correct way to validate. You are just building an XML object. The implementation should be consistent with JSON counterpart. Use xml object mapper to parse and normalise the XML string.

The Javadoc is misleading. It states 'Extracts xml content' and 'the string representation of the XML content' but the method extracts either XML or JSON content based on the contentType parameter. The documentation should reflect that this method handles both content types.
